positive: Stylized vector illustration of a whimsical, floating hot air balloon above rolling hills at sunset. The balloon features a detailed, hand-painted landscape mural of a crescent moon and scattered constellations. The scene uses a limited color palette of deep indigo, soft gold, warm ochre, and muted lavender. Strong emphasis on clean linework, negative space, and flat design principles, reminiscent of mid-century travel posters. The composition is perfectly centered, suitable for a square apparel print. Highly contrasted silhouettes against a soft gradient sky. Graphic novel aesthetic, crisp edges, vector art.
negative: photorealistic, blur, noise, grain, text, watermark, logo, typography, signature, dirty, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low quality, amateur, cropped, cropped background
